channel.title: Sherman Art Works
channel.description: Handmade glass art and Judaica from Israel - candlesticks, Kiddush cups, horn goblets, shofars, mezuzahs, trays and bowls.

item.g:title: Glass Circle Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade Murano-style glass candlesticks - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: Gold Colorful Glass Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade glass candlesticks with a vibrant colorful pattern and gold accents - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: Burgundy Glass Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade glass candlesticks in deep burgundy - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: Jerusalem Wine Horn
item.g:description: Traditional wine horn covered in silver and symbols. Coated with FDA-approved crystal epoxy.

item.g:title: Lion of Judah Goblet
item.g:description: Traditional wine goblet made from a rams horn. Lion in repoussé silver on an ornate base. Coated with FDA-approved crystal epoxy.

item.g:title: Menorah Goblet
item.g:description: Traditional wine goblet made from a rams horn, with a seven-branched menorah encircling the cup. Coated with FDA-approved crystal epoxy.

item.g:title: Glass Decorative Bowl
item.g:description: A handcrafted decorative bowl with a unique custom design, featuring an organic, asymmetrical silhouette and a glossy marbled finish in soft seafoam white tones. The bowl's fluid, irregular edges resemble flowing fabric or flower petals, giving it a modern sculptural aesthetic. Its semi-translucent surface reflects light beautifully, with subtle earthy veining throughout, emphasising its artisanal, one-of-a-kind character.

item.g:title: Oryx Mezuzah
item.g:description: Handmade Oryx horn Mezuzah case covered in silver, shaped and finished by hand in our studio in Israel. A unique and meaningful piece for your home or as a gift. * mezuzah case doesn't include the parchment

item.g:title: Black and White Stripes Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade glass candlesticks with bold black and white stripe pattern - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: Gold and Red Stripes Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade glass candlesticks with rich gold and red stripe pattern - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: Green Dots Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade glass candlesticks with playful green dot pattern - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: Black and White Dots Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade glass candlesticks with classic black and white dot pattern - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: White Glass Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade white glass candlesticks - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: Clear Round Glass Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade clear round glass candlesticks - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: Clear Rectangular Glass Candlesticks
item.g:description: Handmade clear rectangular glass candlesticks - traditional family method candle holders.

item.g:title: Ram Mezuzah
item.g:description: Handmade Ram horn Mezuzah case covered in silver, shaped and finished by hand in our studio in Israel. A unique and meaningful piece for your home or as a gift. * mezuzah case doesn't include the parchment

item.g:title: Kudu Mezuzah
item.g:description: Handmade Kudu horn Mezuzah case covered in silver, shaped and finished by hand in our studio in Israel. A unique and meaningful piece for your home or as a gift. * mezuzah case doesn't include the parchment

item.g:title: Clear Glass Mezuzah
item.g:description: Handmade clear glass Mezuzah case, shaped and finished by hand in our studio in Israel. A unique and meaningful piece for your home or as a gift. * mezuzah case doesn't include the parchment

item.g:title: Tall Blue Glass Cup
item.g:description: Handmade tall glass Kiddush cup with a rich blue tone and a silver-plated rim. Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Tall Colorful Glass Cup
item.g:description: Handmade tall glass Kiddush cup with vibrant swirling colours and a silver-plated rim. Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Tall Red Glass Cup
item.g:description: Handmade tall glass Kiddush cup in deep red with a silver-plated rim. Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Low White Glass Cup
item.g:description: Handmade low glass Kiddush cup in clean white with a silver-plated rim. Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Low Colorful Glass Cup
item.g:description: Handmade low glass Kiddush cup with vibrant orange tones and a silver-plated rim. Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Ceramic Kiddush Cup
item.g:description: Handmade ceramic Kiddush cup with a silver-plated rim, decorated with a Menorah symbol and Aramaic lettering. Coated with FDA-approved crystal epoxy. Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Colorful Glass Cup and Plate
item.g:description: Handmade glass Kiddush cup and matching plate with a vibrant orange palette and silver-plated details. Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Kiddush Cup Plate
item.g:description: Handmade glass Kiddush cup plate with a vibrant orange palette and a silver-plated rim. A beautiful complement to any Kiddush cup. Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text - XS (30–34 cm)
item.g:description: A handmade shofar personalised with your choice of symbol and an optional text inscription (Hebrew/English). Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text - S (35–39 cm)
item.g:description: A handmade shofar personalised with your choice of symbol and an optional text inscription (Hebrew/English). Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text - M (40–44 cm)
item.g:description: A handmade shofar personalised with your choice of symbol and an optional text inscription (Hebrew/English). Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text - L (45–49 cm)
item.g:description: A handmade shofar personalised with your choice of symbol and an optional text inscription (Hebrew/English). Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text - XL (50–54 cm)
item.g:description: A handmade shofar personalised with your choice of symbol and an optional text inscription (Hebrew/English). Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text - J (55–59 cm)
item.g:description: A handmade shofar personalised with your choice of symbol and an optional text inscription (Hebrew/English). Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Custom Ram's Horn Shofar, Symbol & Text - XJ (60–65 cm)
item.g:description: A handmade shofar personalised with your choice of symbol and an optional text inscription (Hebrew/English). Made to order in our studio in Israel.

item.g:title: Kudu Shofar – Hoshen Stones - S (70–79 cm)
item.g:description: Kudu-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver with the twelve stones of the High Priest's breastplate (Hoshen). Handmade in Israel.

item.g:title: Kudu Shofar – Hoshen Stones - M (80–89 cm)
item.g:description: Kudu-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver with the twelve stones of the High Priest's breastplate (Hoshen). Handmade in Israel.

item.g:description: Kudu-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver with the twelve stones of the High Priest's breastplate (Hoshen). Handmade in Israel.

item.g:description: Kudu-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver with the twelve stones of the High Priest's breastplate (Hoshen). Handmade in Israel.

item.g:description: Kudu-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver with the twelve stones of the High Priest's breastplate (Hoshen). Handmade in Israel.

item.g:title: Custom Kudu Shofar, Symbol & Text - Mini (50–59 cm)
item.g:description: Kudu-horn shofar decorated in 925 silver and personalised with your choice of symbol and an optional text inscription (Hebrew/English). Made to order in our studio in Israel.
